name: Fish and Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 lb fish fillets, (cod, halibut, sole) cut into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat skillet (non-stick).
2. Sauté onion in oil.
3. Add mushrooms and sauté about 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until mushrooms wilt.
4. Spread half of fillet slices on mushrooms; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Spread remaining fillet slices on mushrooms; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. Add celery, soy sauce, and sherry.
7. Cook gently, covered, for ten minutes.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 3 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE CAL: 200
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billie Little (1985 version) Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'brion and her Meal-Master
